de.uka.ilkd.key.java.abstraction

Interface ArrayType

  • All Superinterfaces:
    ModelElement, NamedModelElement, ProgramModelElement, Type
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    ArrayDeclaration

    public interface ArrayType
extends Type
    A program model element representing array types.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.lang.String getAlternativeNameRepresentation()
      full name of the array in alternative form, i.e.

      returns the type reference to the arrays base type
      int getDimension()
      returns the dimension of the array

      • getBaseType

        returns the type reference to the arrays base type

        int getDimension()
        returns the dimension of the array
        Returns:

      • getFullName

      • getAlternativeNameRepresentation

        java.lang.String getAlternativeNameRepresentation()
        full name of the array in alternative form, i.e. e.g. int[] instead of [I
